channel.title: People on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in People on CEDIS

item.title: André Luiz Peron Martins Lanna
item.description: Associate Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: Sergio Antônio Andrade de Freitas
item.description: Full Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: Collaborators
item.description:
Current Collaborators

Meet the team that is actively contributing to our projects and research.

PhD

  • Cristiane Soares Ramos. Effects of human factors on secure software development . PhD Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Cybersecurity, Soft Skills .

Master’s degree

  • Gilson de Araújo Borges. Microservices, under development . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas
  • Adriano Nunes Soares. Postmortem Analysis of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Software Atelier . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Digital Transformation .
  • Emanuel Galhardo de Oliveira. Assessment of DevOps Maturity in Cloud Solutions in the Financial Sector . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Software Architecture .
  • Lucas Pereira Gomes Linard. Evaluation of gamification in software code quality . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2024). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Machine Learning .
  • Bruno Mello Andrade. Gamification in Software Engineering: Evaluation of engagement in Information Technology teams in a Software Factory . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2023). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Machine Learning .
  • Lucas Kuniyoshi. (not defined) . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2021). Advisor(s): André Lanna
  • Suéllyn Schopping. (not defined) . Master's Thesis in Applied Computing, University of Brasília (Brazil), (2021). Advisor(s): André Lanna

Undergraduate Research

  • Daniel Rodrigues da Rocha. Predictive Framework for Student Engagement and Performance in Gamified Learning Environments Based on Octalysis, Neuroscientific Indicators, and Machine Learning . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence .
  • Davi Rodrigues da Rocha. Predictive Framework for Student Engagement and Performance in Gamified Learning Environments Based on Octalysis, Neuroscientific Indicators, and Machine Learning . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence .
  • Mylena Angélica Silva Farias. Predictive Framework for Student Engagement and Performance in Gamified Learning Environments Based on Octalysis, Neuroscientific Indicators, and Machine Learning . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence .
  • Maurício Ferreira de Araújo. Accelerating PIC with GPU . Undergraduate Research, (2025). Advisor(s): Daniel Sundfeld . Tags: High Performance Computing .
  • Lucas Monteiro Freitas - Undergraduate in Software Engineering, University of Brasília Works on the development of Evidentia Review, a CEDIS software platform for systematic literature reviews. Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas .

Bachelor’s Thesis

  • Ian Lucca Soares Mesquita. Impact of the use of AI in a Software Engineering course . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Education .
  • André Lopes de Sousa. Artificial intelligence and law . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence .
  • Israel Thalles Dutra dos Santos. Topic under development . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas
  • Christian Hirsch Santos. Impact of the use of AI in a Software Engineering course . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Education .
  • Henrique Azevedo Batalha. Topic under development . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas
  • Marina Marcia Costa de Souza. Topic under development . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2026). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas
  • Mateus Cunha Maia. CPU Parallelization Strategies for the Optimization of Biological Sequence Comparison Algorithms . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Daniel Sundfeld . Tags: High Performance Computing .
  • Ana Beatriz Norberto da Silva. Gamified Tool for Agile Management: A Web Application for Task Management . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Active Learning .
  • Beatriz Vieira Nascimento. Gamified Tool for Agile Management: A Web Application for Task Management . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Active Learning .
  • Geovanna Maciel Avelino da Costa. Interactive Visualization of Data Structures with Augmented Reality to Support Algorithm Teaching: A Gamified Approach for Engagement and Active Learning . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Active Learning, Social Software .
  • Luciano Ricardo da Silva Junior. Gamification and Code Smells . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Software Architecture .
  • Mylena Angélica Silva Farias. Interactive Visualization of Data Structures with Augmented Reality to Support Algorithm Teaching: A Gamified Approach for Engagement and Active Learning . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification, Active Learning, Social Software .
  • Delziron Braz de Lima. Application to support mood and mental well-being . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Education, Social Software .
  • Fellipe Pereira da Costa Silva. Application to support mood and mental well-being . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Education, Social Software .
  • Breno Henrique de Souza. Centralization of information as support for student development in higher education at FCTE . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Education .
  • Giulia Domingues de Alcantara. Centralization of information as support for student development in higher education at FCTE . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Education .
  • Maria Eduarda D Santos Abritta F. Application of Machine Learning to the Non-Invasive Prediction of Euploidy in Human Embryos Based on Morphokinetic Data . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Sabrina Caldas Berna. Application of Machine Learning to the Non-Invasive Prediction of Euploidy in Human Embryos Based on Morphokinetic Data . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): George Marsicano . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Luis Eduardo Carneiro Miranda. Smart Inventory Manager . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Daniel Sundfeld . Tags: Software Architecture .
  • Vinícius Mendes Martins. Smart Inventory Manager . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Daniel Sundfeld . Tags: Software Architecture .
  • Leonardo Gonçalves Machado. Parallel Optimal Solutions for Sliding Puzzle and Rubik's Cube . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Daniel Sundfeld . Tags: High Performance Computing .
  • Victorio Lázaro Rocha de Morais. Pipeline for the Analysis of Brazilian Biomolecules with an Architecture Based on Microservices and GPUs . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Daniel Sundfeld . Tags: High Performance Computing .

CEDIS volunteer

  • Danielle Soares Da Silva. Development of AI-based solutions . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): André Lanna Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Danilo de Melo Ribeiro. Development of AI-based solutions . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): André Lanna Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Edson Pereira Roldao Filho. Development of AI-based solutions . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): André Lanna Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Kaleb de Souza Macedo. Development of AI-based solutions . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): André Lanna Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Matheus de Alcantara Da Silva Campos. Development of AI-based solutions . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): André Lanna Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Yuri Souza de Andrade Castro Silva. Development of AI-based solutions . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): André Lanna Sergio Freitas . Tags: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning .
  • Carlos Eduardo Mendes de Mesquita. Project on Gamification Literature Review . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification .
  • Diogo Oliveira Ferreira. Project on Gamification Literature Review . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification .
  • Gabriel Santos Pinto. Project on Gamification Literature Review . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification .
  • Maciel Ferreira Custódio Junior. Project on Gamification Literature Review . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification .
  • Pedro Henrique Martins Silva. Indigenous Language Translator App: Munduruku . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas Célia Kinuko Matsunaga Higawa . Tags: Social Software .
  • Pietro Calegari Visentin. Project on Gamification Literature Review . Bachelor of Software Engineering - University of Brasília (Brazil), (2025). Advisor(s): Sergio Freitas . Tags: Gamification .

Former Collaborators

These are the collaborators who contributed to our success in the past. We are grateful for their effort and dedication.

item.title: George Marsicano Corrêa
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing with a focus on requirements, human aspects, and software engineering education.

item.title: Cristiane Soares Ramos
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program on software quality, digital government, and software engineering education.

item.title: Daniel Sundfeld Lima
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program with a focus on parallel computing, high-performance computing, GPU, cloud computing, and bioinformatics.

item.title: Ricardo Ajax Dias Kosloski
item.description: Assistant Professor II at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program on software engineering, software metrics, testing, and software quality.

item.title: Fabiana Freitas Mendes
item.description: Associate Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program.

item.title: Arthur Rocha Temporim de Lacerda
item.description: Master’s student in Applied Computing at PPCA, University of Brasília.

item.title: Edmilson Cosme da Silva
item.description: Master in Applied Computing, University of Brasília

item.title: Lucas Monteiro Freitas
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering, University of Brasília
